title: simply toggle night vision
description: Instantly enable or disable night vision using the N key.
body:
## # **Tired of the darkness? Just press N and light it up instantly.**

This mod lets you toggle night vision on and off in a split second — no potions, no commands, no hassle. Whether you're deep in caves, mining for diamonds, or exploring at night, you stay in control with a single key.

⚡ Fast. Clean. Lightweight.
🎮 Client-side only — no impact on your world or server.

Press **N**. See everything. It’s that simple.
